texto: I'm not looking for anything more than any other guy. I like a good smile. Pretty eyes. She has to be active, like not play-sports active, but she'll play air hockey, do some pool, go for rides on the Santa Monica Pier. I would much rather have fun with her than do the cool thing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mitchel Musso: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I'm not looking for anything more than any other guy. I like a good smile. Pretty eyes. She has t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, good, eyes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de eyes e cool.

frase_original: I'm not looking for anything more than any other guy. I like a good smile. Pretty eyes. She has to be active, like not play-sports active, but she'll play air hockey, do some pool, go for rides on the Santa Monica Pier. I would much rather have fun with her than do the cool thing.
